# MuleSoft Runtime Manager

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Runtime Manager documentation.
> See [Runtime Manager llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/runtime-manager/llms-full.txt) for all the Runtime Manager documentation in one file.

## Content
